themes.theme: Broad USD weakness ahead of FOMC amid Fed leadership uncertainty and Iran diplomacy hopes
Stalled US-Iran nuclear talks driving oil toward $100, pressuring oil-importing currencies (INR) while boosting commodity exporters (AUD, CAD)
Central bank super-week (BoJ, ECB, BoE, Fed) anchoring positioning — hawkish BoE repricing supporting GBP, cautious ECB capping EUR upside
JPY strengthening on safe-haven demand and BoJ policy expectations despite equity record highs

key_observation: The USD is weakening even as risk sentiment remains cautious and oil surges — suggesting the sell-off is driven by structural Fed credibility and leadership concerns rather than simple risk-on rotation.
watch: WTI approaching $100 on stalled Iran talks — a break above could sharply reprice inflation expectations ahead of Wednesday's FOMC decision.
